query: SELECT TABLE_NAME, TABLE_ROWS FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('conciliacaoTasy', 'conciliacao', 'resumoConciliacaoTasy', 'resumoConciliacao', 'vinculacao_codigos');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xKWvZvidGuv3Qt.root --database 98MRdVE9Uf2ZRMz25bPSye --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME, TABLE_ROWS FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME IN ('conciliacaoTasy', 'conciliacao', 'resumoConciliacaoTasy', 'resumoConciliacao', 'vinculacao_codigos');
